'''Liam Byrne''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], he was posted to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] as part of a team investigating the [[Great Temple/Legends|abandoned Rebel base]] there. He did not like the climate there and hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to help him with a number of tasks.

==Behind the scenes==
Liam Byrne, identified as Cmdr. Liam Byrne in the [[Star Wars video games|game]], was a [[Wikipedia:Non-Player Character|non-player character]] (NPC) in the [[2003]] [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
